     7	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     8	
     9	export type { TabsRendererProps }
    10	
    11	export function TabsRenderer({ tabs }: TabsRendererProps) {
    12	  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
    13	  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    14	  const rendererConfig = useRendererConfig()
    15	
    16	  const tabRefs = useRef<Map<string, HTMLButtonElement>>(new Map())
    17	  const listRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    18	  const [indicator, setIndicator] = useState({ left: 0, width: 0 })
    19	
    20	  const updateIndicator = useCallback(() => {
    21	    const el = tabRefs.current.get(activeTab)
    22	    const list = listRef.current
    23	    if (el && list) {
    24	      const listRect = list.getBoundingClientRect()
    25	      const tabRect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
    26	      setIndicator({
    27	        left: tabRect.left - listRect.left,
    28	        width: tabRect.width,
    29	      })
    30	    }
    31	  }, [activeTab])
    32	
    33	  useEffect(() => {
    34	    updateIndicator()
    35	  }, [updateIndicator])
    36	
    37	  useEffect(() => {
    38	    if (tabs.length === 0) return
    39	    if (tabs.some((tab) => tab.label === activeTab)) return
    40	    setActiveTab(tabs[0]?.label ?? '')
    41	  }, [activeTab, tabs])
    42	
    43	  if (tabs.length === 0) return null
    44	
    45	  return (
    46	    <div className="rich-tabs">
    47	      <div className="rich-tabs-list-wrapper">
    48	        <div className="rich-tabs-list" ref={listRef}>
    49	          {tabs.map((tab) => (
    50	            <button
    51	              key={tab.label}
    52	              type="button"
    53	              className="rich-tabs-trigger"
    54	              data-selected={tab.label === activeTab ? '' : undefined}
    55	              onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.label)}
    56	              ref={(el: HTMLButtonElement | null) => {
    57	                if (el) tabRefs.current.set(tab.label, el)
    58	                else tabRefs.current.delete(tab.label)
    59	              }}
    60	            >
    61	              {tab.label}
    62	            </button>
    63	          ))}
    64	
    65	          <div
    66	            className="rich-tabs-indicator"
    67	            style={{ left: indicator.left, width: indicator.width }}
    68	            aria-hidden
    69	          />
    70	        </div>
    71	
    72	        <div className="rich-tabs-separator" />
    73	      </div>
    74	
    75	      <div className="rich-tabs-content-wrapper">
    76	        {tabs.map((tab) => (
    77	          <div
    78	            key={tab.label}
    79	            className="rich-tabs-content"
    80	            hidden={tab.label !== activeTab}
    81	          >
    82	            {tab.label === activeTab && (

    84	                value={tab.content}
    85	                theme={colorScheme}
    86	                rendererConfig={rendererConfig}
    87	              />
    88	            )}

    91	      </div>
    92	    </div>

     9	
    10	export function OnChangePlugin({ onChange, debounceMs }: OnChangePluginProps) {
    11	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    12	  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    13	  const onChangeRef = useRef(onChange)
    14	  onChangeRef.current = onChange
    15	
    16	  useEffect(() => {
    17	    const unregister = editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    18	      const fn = onChangeRef.current
    19	      if (!fn) return
    20	
    21	      if (debounceMs && debounceMs > 0) {
    22	        clearTimeout(timerRef.current)
    23	        timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
    24	          fn(editorState.toJSON())
    25	        }, debounceMs)
    26	      } else {
    27	        fn(editorState.toJSON())
    28	      }
    29	    })
    30	
    31	    return () => {
    32	      clearTimeout(timerRef.current)
    33	      unregister()
    34	    }
    35	  }, [editor, debounceMs])
    36	
    37	  return null
    38	}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:02:09Z)**_

**Findings**
1. **High**: DnD identity/keying is label-based, which breaks on duplicate labels and can reorder the wrong tab. `handleDragEnd` resolves indices via `labels.indexOf(...)`, so duplicates always resolve to the first match, and React keys also collide.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:249`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:325`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:364`

2. **Medium**: `TabsEditNode.clone` recreates every nested `LexicalEditor` from serialized JSON on each node clone, unlike the grid pattern (which preserves editor instances). This can cause editor-instance churn, focus/selection/history resets, and unnecessary parse cost on rename/reorder.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:68`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:32`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:73`

3. **Medium**: `TabsEditNode` keeps two sources of truth (`__tabs` from `TabsNode` plus `__tabLabels`/`__tabEditors`), but mutators only update the latter. Inherited APIs like `getTabs()`/`setTabs()` can become stale/inconsistent.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:79`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:115`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsNode.ts:71`

4. **Medium**: Removing a tab before the active tab does not adjust `activeIndex` unless out-of-bounds, so selection can jump to the wrong logical tab.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:204`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:286`

5. **Low**: `KeyboardSensor` is enabled without sortable keyboard coordinates, so keyboard reordering is likely incomplete/non-standard.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/TabsEditDecorator.tsx:241`

**Open Questions / Assumptions**
1. If persisted/API-provided tab labels can duplicate, finding #1 is immediately user-visible.
2. Tabs now parse content into editors with `NESTED_EDITOR_NODES`; if tab content may contain other node types, import/round-trip compatibility needs validation.
`packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:24`, `packages/rich-ext-tabs/src/nodes/TabsEditNode.ts:36`
3. `packages/rich-editor/src/index.ts` re-export looks fine; no functional issue found there.
`packages/rich-editor/src/index.ts:27`

Type-check note: `pnpm -C packages/rich-ext-tabs exec tsc --noEmit --incremental false` passed.
